data.title: Polkadot aims for $1.50 by May with current price at $1.17. Smart money accumulation indicates positive movement soon.
data.description: The current trading price of Polkadot is $1.17, indicating oversold conditions. However, market analysis shows that smart investors are positioning themselves for a potential increase in value, with a target of reaching the $1.50 resistance level within the next 30 days. This positive outlook is driven by negative funding rates, which are benefiting patient long-term investors.

data.title: Tether releases QVAC SDK for on-device AI, accessible across all platforms, showcasing their move into decentralized intelligence infrastructure.
data.description: Tether has introduced the open-source QVAC Software Development Kit (SDK), making it possible to have on-device artificial intelligence (AI) capabilities. This move signifies a significant step for the stablecoin company into decentralized intelligence infrastructure. The new SDK will allow users to leverage local AI on any device, showcasing Tether's advancement in this area. This marks a key development for the stablecoin industry, offering greater accessibility to AI technology.

data.title: DASH near $38 may soar to $42 due to 57% long positions, unless it dips to $30.
data.description: The cryptocurrency DASH is currently valued at $38.23 and is showing signs of being poised for a significant price shift. This move is being influenced by 57% of major investors holding long positions, indicating a strong bullish sentiment. If DASH surpasses the $40 mark, it could potentially reach $42; however, failing to do so might result in a drop to the $30 support level. Investors should closely monitor these price levels for potential trading opportunities.

data.title: ENA surpasses $0.10 resistance, eyes $0.11 target. Smart money is 70% long, open interest rises by 15.55%. Expect 10% gains.
data.description: Ethena has broken through a crucial resistance level of $0.10, supported by 70% long positions from experienced investors and a notable 15.55% increase in open interest. The next target is set at $0.11, presenting a potential gain of 10%.

data.title: Virginia enacts law (HB 798) for custody of unclaimed crypto, requiring original holdings for 1 year before liquidation. Trend in state regulations.
data.description: The Governor of Virginia has approved HB 798, requiring unclaimed cryptocurrencies to be retained in their original form for a minimum of one year before being liquidated. This move aligns Virginia with the increasing regulatory pattern surrounding cryptocurrencies. The new law aims to ensure that unclaimed digital assets are securely held for a designated period before any liquidation process commences, providing added protection for individuals' unclaimed funds.

data.title: STO poised to break out at $0.17 as institutions accumulate at $0.12. Technicals suggest a 40%+ move soon.
data.description: The cryptocurrency STO is currently trading at $0.12 with strong support, as institutional investors are increasing their positions in anticipation of a potential surge to $0.17. Technical analysis suggests a possible increase of over 40%, with smart money steadily accumulating assets.

data.title: Pakistan ends 8-year ban, allowing crypto firms to open bank accounts. Licensed exchanges can now operate under new framework.
data.description: The State Bank of Pakistan has recently allowed licensed crypto exchanges to establish bank accounts under the new Virtual Assets Act framework, marking a significant shift from the ban imposed in 2018. This update provides a major opportunity for the crypto industry in the country as these exchanges can now operate more seamlessly within the financial system. The reversal of the prohibition is expected to boost the growth of the crypto sector and promote greater financial inclusion. The move reflects the evolving regulatory landscape regarding virtual assets and aims to facilitate a more conducive environment for digital asset trading.

data.title: AAVE surpasses $102 barrier, aims for $120 in 2 weeks as top traders are 61.5% long, whales increasing holdings.
data.description: The cryptocurrency AAVE has successfully surpassed a key resistance level of $102, attracting significant investment from large investors known as whales. Market data suggests that the next target for AAVE is $120, with a majority (61.5%) of skilled traders betting on a bullish trend. This development signifies growing confidence in the AAVE market and a potential upward momentum in the near future.

data.title: Fireblocks introduces Earn to Let for 2,400 institutions, linking to DeFi lending. Processes $6 trillion in 2025.
data.description: Fireblocks has recently launched an institutional gateway that provides access to Aave and Morpho lending protocols. This initiative aims to capitalize on idle stablecoin balances, following the company's successful processing of $6 trillion in transactions by 2025. Through this gateway, institutional investors can now participate in lending activities on Aave and Morpho, expanding their investment opportunities in the decentralized finance market.
German Defence Minister: There is no quick opening of the Strait of Hormuz in sight.
UK's Chancellor Reeves: Growth will be higher and inflation lower if the war ends.

data.title: How The SEC's New Day Trading Rules Boost Webull, Robinhood Stock
data.description: After the SEC removed minimum requirements for day trading, Webull and Robinhood saw a surge in stock value. Bernstein predicts a rebound for Robinhood stock. The changes have created optimism among investors, with Webull and Robinhood stocks experiencing a notable rally following the announcement. This move by the SEC has had a significant impact on the market, with many predicting positive growth for these companies in the near future.

data.title: Why AST SpaceMobile Could Buy Iridium, Viasat Spectrum To Counter Amazon's Globalstar Deal
data.description: According to analysts, AST SpaceMobile might retaliate against Amazon's bid to acquire Globalstar by considering the purchase of Viasat or Iridium spectrum assets. This potential move aims to counter Amazon's proposed deal and maintain competitiveness in the market. The acquisition of these spectrum assets could significantly impact the telecommunications industry and the ongoing competition between major players. The situation reflects the intense rivalry and strategic maneuvers within the sector.

data.title: Which Solar Stocks Are Rising And Falling As China Considers Export Ban?
data.description: A recent report suggests that China is deliberating on restricting the export of advanced solar energy technologies to the U.S. This move could have varying outcomes for different solar stocks, with some set to benefit from the potential limitation while others may face challenges. The impact of this consideration on the solar energy market is being closely monitored by investors.

data.title: Snap To Cut 16% Of Workforce. Stock Jumps.
data.description: Snap stock experienced a surge after the parent company of Snapchat announced its intention to reduce its global workforce by 16% as part of an effort to streamline operations. The decision to cut jobs resulted in a significant boost in the company's stock value.

data.title: Immersive Film Production Moves Beyond Headsets
data.description: In Los Angeles and Las Vegas, a speaker at the NAB Show, Matt Celia from Light Sail VR, will address the hurdles encountered in enlarging immersive post-production processes with the emergence of new revenue streams.

data.title: Molex Accelerates Global Supply Chain Transformation and AI Success with Celonis Process Intelligence
data.description: A partnership has been revealed between Celonis and Molex, illustrating the significance of process context in enabling dependable and scalable Enterprise AI solutions. This collaboration highlights the importance of establishing a strong foundation for AI in the business sector.

data.title: 5WPR Publishes First-Ever Fortune 500 PR Spend Analysis
data.description: On April 15, 2026, 5W Public Relations published the PR Spend Transparency Study, the first analysis of its kind examining how Fortune 500 companies distribute funds for public relations. The report, available on Everything-PR.com, is based on data from SEC filings, Gartner, and other sources.

data.title: MONTERA NAMES ASHLEY CODD (MICHALOVSKY) AS CFO
data.description: Montera Infrastructure has strengthened its executive team by adding Codd, who comes with over 20 years of financial leadership experience from Iron Mountain and P&G. This move was announced in San Francisco on April 15, 2026. Montera is a company focused on advancing digital infrastructure and has been expanding its team to enhance its capabilities in this field.
